characters.name: Audrey
characters.description: "Do you remember when [Mrs. Cramdilly] found us? Curled up with our ma in a laundry hamper?"— Gordon Quid Audrey CramdillySpeciesCalico CatGenderFemaleResidenceThe Cramdilly MansionRelationshipsParentsEdna Cramdilly(owner)ChildrenMr. Blik,Gordon Quid,WaffleBehind the scenesVoiced bynoneOnly appearanceThe Ghost of CramdillyAudreywasMr. Blik,Gordon, andWaffle'smother andMrs. Cramdilly'scat. Audrey is a scruffy Calico cat. Her name was mentioned by her son Gordon inSlumber Party. She made a small cameo in a flashback inThe Ghost of Cramdilly. She carried great love for her young ones, even going through lengths to make little diapers for them. Like her owner Mrs. Cramdilly, she had died sometime before the events of the show. Her physical traits were inherited by her three sons: Mr. Blik's long pointed ears, Gordon's patch eye and Waffle's striped tail. Unlike her sons, who are more anthropomorphic, Audrey was a realistic-looking cat.
characters.personality_section: Her physical traits were inherited by her three sons: Mr. Blik's long pointed ears, Gordon's patch eye and Waffle's striped tail. Unlike her sons, who are more anthropomorphic, Audrey was a realistic-looking cat.

characters.name: Baby Alien
characters.description: "It's my alien offspring, and when it hatches, I'll have an alien baby!"— Waffle being a proud parent. Baby AlienBornOctober 28, 2005AliasesAlien offspring, watermelonSpeciesExtraterrestrialResidencePresumably The Cramdilly MansionOccupationInfantBehind the scenesVoiced byRob PaulsenOnly appearanceScaredy CatBaby Alienis one of a species of extraterrestrial insect-like creatures, the one of whichWaffleincubated. WhileMr. BlikandGordonthought the egg was simply a watermelon, Waffle knew it was an egg that was expected to hatch soon. Waffle took care of the egg and held onto it while a couple of aliens was attacking everyone in the house. When it finally hatched, this little fellow popped out. Baby Aliens are dangerous to be around. When one was born, it hissed at Gordon and Mr. Blik, scaring them off. However, these beings are very kind to their parents no matter what species they are, and love being cradled.
characters.personality_section: Baby Aliens are dangerous to be around. When one was born, it hissed at Gordon and Mr. Blik, scaring them off. However, these beings are very kind to their parents no matter what species they are, and love being cradled.

characters.description: BarkmeatSpeciesPit-BullGenderMaleResidenceBakersfield, CAOccupationCriminalRelationshipsFriendsWaffleEnemiesMr. Blik,Gordon QuidBehind the scenesVoiced byClancy Brown "Who dares enter the sanctity of my domain? Name yourself."— Barkmeat Barkmeatis a stray dog who only appeared in the episode "Off The Leash," in which he metWaffle(who had run away from home, believing he's meant to be a dog.)

characters.name: Bill Champsley
characters.description: "You can call me "Bill", but if you do: I'll smack you~"— Champsley,King of Clubs Bill ChampsleyKing of ClubsA Wooly AdventureAge56BornDecember 24, 1962AliasesBill, ChampsleySpeciesHumanGenderMaleOccupationClub President of TheSpecial Meadows Country ClubBehind the scenesVoiced byJim WardFirst appearanceKing of ClubsLast appearanceA Wooly Adventure William "Bill" Champsley(or simplyChampsley) is an upper-class middle-aged man of whomMr. Blikattempts to impress for membership to theSpecial Meadows Country Club. Bill Champsley is a rather snooty gentleman who often tries to keep his cool when annoyed. He is of a leisurely nature and is in great social position, but can turn a little barbaric when he's made a fool of (especially by talking cats). When Bakersfield was trampled over by a woolly mammoth looking for a twig, Champsley led an angry mob of Special Meadows Country Club members to take it down. When they watched the mammoth drown (allegedly), he and the mob walked off with Champsley saying "Let's go find something ELSE to destroy that we don't understand."

characters.name: Blue Tick
characters.description: Blue TickSpeciesInsectBehind the scenesOnly appearanceMy Bodyguards Blue Ticksare a species of predator insects that sneak into food to enter the mouths of unsuspecting people. These blue oval-shaped bugs have mouth pinchers with red tips. Their antennae is a darker shade of blue and it has six legs. It is a slightly hairy insect and has a few dark speckles across it’s body. These blue oval-shaped bugs have mouth pinchers with red tips. Their antennae is a darker shade of blue and it has six legs. It is a slightly hairy insect and has a few dark speckles across it’s body.

characters.name: Bootsie
characters.description: BootsieAliasesThat evil catSpeciesBrown Tabby CatGenderMaleBehind the scenesVoiced byMaurice LaMarcheOnly appearanceMy BodyguardsBootsieis a big, tough cat who tries to beatMr. Blikup for being a "pampered wimp" inMy Bodyguards. As revealed in the conclusion of the episode, he is actuallyThe Chumpy Chump Brothers' lost cat. Though he's a rough, tough cat, he's a bit gullible (once, he got convinced that a flying saucer was giving away free gold.) Bootsie has tan fur, a stitch on his lip, crooked teeth, a fluffy tail and blue eyes. He has three hairs atop his scalp, three more hairs sticking out on his chest, and three stripes on his upper arms. A lot of his design (and personality) hints that his owners are indeedThe Chumpy Chump Brothers. Alternatively, he's "SIX feet TALL, NINE feet WIDE, and razor-sharp TEETH ALL OVER HIS BODY!" characters.name: Caitlyn 1
characters.description: Caitlyn #1Age9AliasesCoocoo PileSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleRelationshipsFriendsHuman Kimberly,Caitlyn 2,CharlotteEnemiesGordon Quid,Waffle,Mr. BlikBehind the scenesVoiced byHaley RammFirst appearanceTale of the TailLast appearanceZombie Party a Go-Go!Caitlyn #1is a young girl who makes her first speaking role and debut in the episodeTale of the Tail. Caitlyn #1 is a friend ofKimberly's and is shown to be playful and lively, and has a similar affinity for unicorns as Kimberly and her group of friends do. She shares the same name as Caitlyn #2. Once, she and the other Caitlyn were seen making fun of Gordon for having a stumpy tail, meaning they are not above bullying, at least to cats. She also seems to be able to take a punch, as when she was hit by a pillow to the face, she took it as a start to a pillow fight. When she first met the three cats, they were disguised as young girls, and she took a liking to them. When they later took their wigs off, she and the other girls shaved the boys, upsetting the relationship. Caitlyn #1 is a short girl who has light brown hair with two green hairclips on each side. She has braces on her teeth that gives her an overbite. She wears a green overall dress with dark mint shirt underneath. She also wears green shoes with long white socks. Caitlyn #1 is a friend ofKimberly's and is shown to be playful and lively, and has a similar affinity for unicorns as Kimberly and her group of friends do. She shares the same name as Caitlyn #2. She also seems to be able to take a punch, as when she was hit by a pillow to the face, she took it as a start to a pillow fight. When she first met the three cats, they were disguised as young girls, and she took a liking to them. When they later took their wigs off, she and the other girls shaved the boys, upsetting the relationship.

characters.name: Caitlyn 2
characters.description: Caitlyn  #2Age8SpeciesHumanGenderFemaleRelationshipsFriendsCaitlyn,Human Kimberly,CharlotteEnemiesMr. Blik,Gordon Quid,WaffleBehind the scenesVoiced byGabby SoleilFirst appearanceTale of the TailLast appearanceZombie Party a Go-Go! Caitlyn #2is an 8-year old girl who makes her first speaking and debut in the episode “Tale of the Tail”.  Caitlyn #2 is shown to be playful and lively just like Caitlyn #1. Although that she is friends with Kimberly, she can be a bit rough. She andCaitlyn #1once made fun ofGordonfor having a stumpy tail. Later on the episode, she befriends Gordon and his brothers not knowing of them from being girls. After she and her friends find out that the cats were boys, she become disgusted by them and shaved them all, upsetting their friendship.

characters.description: You can help Catscratch Wiki byexpanding it. CharlotteAge8SpeciesHumanGenderFemaleRelationshipsFriendsHuman Kimberly,Caitlyn 1,Caitlyn 2EnemiesMr. Blik,Gordon Quid,WaffleBehind the scenesVoiced byLiliana MumyFirst appearanceSlumber PartyLast appearanceCore-uption(cameo)Charlotteis a young girl who first appears in the episodeSlumber Party. Charlotte is a young girl who is very tall. She has long blonde hair. She wears a violet dress with a violet headband with a bow on top. She also wears violet flats.

characters.name: Chrimadon
characters.description: ChrimadonSpeciesChrimadonResidenceMagicy ForestBehind the scenesOnly appearanceLove CatsChrimadonare mythical creatures of sparkles. Their existence is unconfirmed, as the only one seen on screen was debunked. With the intention to win overHuman KimberlyfromGordon,Mr. Blikhad dressed upa donkeyinto one of these creatures, and gifts it to Kimberly. Gordon then tore off the costume and revealed the donkey underneath. Chrimadon have a pony-like stature and are covered in lemon-colored fur. The creature's eyes are blue and sparkling and have long eyelashes. It has a brown beak and bird feet with gray toes.

characters.name: Chubby Chef
characters.description: Chubby ChefAgeMiddle AgedSpeciesHumanGenderMaleOccupationCulinary ArtsRelationshipsFriendsSpecial Meadows Country Club,Island ResortEnemiesLobsters,Klaus,Rhonda,WaffleBehind the scenesFirst appearanceKing of ClubsLast appearanceLife Savers TheChubby Chefis a recurring cook that is often seen working at vacation-based establishments. The Chubby Chef seems to take joy in his profession. He is often seen smiling while either preparing a dish or serving it. The Chubby Chef seems to take joy in his profession. characters.name: Commodore Nougat
characters.description: Commodore NougatCommodore Nougat in Blik’s handsClassDollOwner(s)Mr. BlikChronologyFirst SeenBlikmailCommodore Nougatis a penguin plush doll who made his debut in the episodeBlikmail. He is voiced byRob Paulsen. Commodore Nougat isMr. Blik’s favorite toy and he had him ever since he was a kitten. He seems to look just like a regular doll, but he’s actually an mind-controlling doll. He has his own page in The Scottish Book of Evil Beasts. As said in the book, He shows up and within a hour, takes control of your brain and turns it sour. By the end of the episode, it was revealed that Gordon was right in that the doll was sentient, and that it was in control of Mr. Blik's brain. Commodore Nougat is a small plush penguin doll who has purple skin and a lavender stomach. He has a yellow beak and yellow feet. He wears a blue commodore hat and only has one eye as the other was torn off.

characters.name: Dogcatcher
characters.description: You can help Catscratch Wiki byexpanding it. TheDogcatcheris a character inCatscratch. He only appeared inOff The Leash, in which he capturedWaffleandBarkmeatand imprisoned them in the pound, until the two of them managed to escape and avoid being caught by the dogcatcher.

characters.name: Donkey
characters.description: DonkeySpeciesDonkeyGenderMaleRelationshipsFriendsHuman KimberlyEnemiesGordon Quid,Mr. BlikBehind the scenesVoiced byWayne KnightOnly appearanceLove CatsThe Donkeyis a creature thatMr. Blikdressed up to foolHuman Kimberly. To win over Kimberly, Blik dressed up this donkey into aChrimadon, and was ultimately debunked byGordonwhen he tore the suspicious costume off the donkey. The donkey carried the defeated Blik off screen. The next day, the donkey kicks Mr. Blik into a window shelf that knocks a series of potted plants onto his head.

DuckSpeciesDuckGenderMaleResidenceThe pond at the parkRelationshipsEnemiesGordon Quid,Mr. Blik,WaffleBehind the scenesVoiced byMaxwell AtomsOnly appearanceDuck and CoverDuckis an evil duck who hates cats. He left a mental scar on Gordon when he attacked him as an infant.

characters.name: Duck
characters.description: You can help Catscratch Wiki byexpanding it. DuckSpeciesDuckGenderMaleResidenceThe pond at the parkRelationshipsEnemiesGordon Quid,Mr. Blik,WaffleBehind the scenesVoiced byMaxwell AtomsOnly appearanceDuck and CoverDuckis an evil duck who hates cats. He left a mental scar on Gordon when he attacked him as an infant.

characters.name: Duke Eark Splee
characters.description: Eark SpleeAliasesSpleeSpeciesHumanGenderMaleOccupationChefBehind the scenesVoiced byMaxwell AtomsOnly appearanceTo The MoonDuke Eark Spleeis a legend character inCatscratch. His tale is titled "The Legend of Duke Eark Splee". Eark Splee seemed to be an adventurous man with a passion for cooking. This passion proved to be downfall of the man, since he traded his very soul to aSeal Womanfor the secrets of making the perfect barbecue pit. But the success would never be enough to replenish the hollow void that was left in his heart after the trade. He was a chiseled and brawny man with a hat that resembled the sun, hair flowing down his head and a face ready to tackle everything. He wears puffy clothes with a bird symbol on his chest and it tied at the waist. The colors of the man are unknown, as he only appeared in a storybook. Eark Splee seemed to be an adventurous man with a passion for cooking. This passion proved to be downfall of the man, since he traded his very soul to aSeal Womanfor the secrets of making the perfect barbecue pit. But the success would never be enough to replenish the hollow void that was left in his heart after the trade.

characters.name: Edna Cramdilly
characters.description: "My, look at you, so brave and proud!"— Mrs. Cramdilly,The Ghost of Cramdilly Edna CramdillyAliasesMrs. CramdillySpeciesHumanGenderFemaleResidenceCramdilly Mansion(formerly)Behind the scenesVoiced byMaurice LaMarche(English)Rommy Mendoza(Spanish)First appearanceThe Ghost of CramdillyLast appearanceDuck and Cover Mrs. Edna Cramdillywas an elderly billionaire woman who lived in amansionwith her catAudrey. She was a tall elder, with hergrayhair tied up in a bun. She wears studded pearl earrings, a pearl necklace and a frillypinkpuffy shoulder maxi dress. She also wearsblackflats under her dress. In the episodeDuck and Cover, in the flashback of her carrying baby Gordon in a stroller, she wears a frillytealmaxi dress that has a similar appearance to herpinkdress she always wears.

characters.name: Elder's Guards
characters.description: Inbetween all the soldiers if Newton, there's two guards to protect the Elder himself. After all, in a time like this, you really need someone you can trust on. Question is, CAN you trust someone in a time like this...?

characters.name: Elder's Guards
characters.description: Inbetween all the soldiers if Newton, there's two guards to protect the Elder himself. After all, in a time like this, you really need someone you can trust on. Question is, CAN you trust someone in a time like this...?

characters.name: Emperor Pago
characters.description: Emperor Pagois the royal ancestor of the Northplate cats who once made the Forbidden Mechanism, generations ago. He still does believe that the Mechanism exists and that it's meant just for him and his royal Guardian. He was the main antagonist ofGear (Comic Series). He allies up with the President of Dogtown to win a war against Newton, which are technically part of his own people - but as his motto goes: "Screw heritage." He met his demise whenGordon Quidshoved him into the pits of Hell afterWafflewas destroyed by him.

characters.name: Ernst
characters.description: ErnstSpeciesNewtGenderMaleResidenceThe Cramdilly Mansion,Bakersfield, CAOccupationPetRelationshipsFriendsWaffle,Gomez,MandyErnstis one ofWaffle's dozens of petnewts. Bakersfield, CA Not much is known about Ernst, as he is simply one of the many newts Waffle has. What we can assume is that he's normally in the crowd of newts that Waffle usually has around, whether they're playing hide and seek or relaxing at theNewt Pond. characters.name: F.M. Cult
characters.description: The F.M.Cult is a group of fanatics who believe in the Forbidden Mechanism and nothing else. They too find out soon that the Forbidden Mechanism appears to be found and brought to Newton...

characters.description: Gabby Soleil

characters.name: Gomez
characters.description: GomezSpeciesNewtGenderMaleResidenceThe Cramdilly Mansion, Bakersfield, CAOccupationLucky newtRelationshipsFriendsWaffle,Gordon QuidEnemiesThe Chumpy Chump Brothers,Mr. BlikBehind the scenesVoiced byKevin McDonaldFirst appearanceGo Gomez! Go!Gomezis one ofWaffle's dozens of pet newts, and is considered his "lucky newt". This little newt is loyal to Waffle, but is seen as an irritant toMr. Blik. Gomez is the most treasured of Waffle’s newts, and is said to harbor great luck. This is of course tough to believe for Gordon and Mr. Blik (especially Blik), but Waffle will not cut corners when it comes to keeping this little guy safe and sound. Gomez rides onGear’s dashboard when Waffle drives, and Waffle will drive steadily and slowly with his little newt buddy on board. Once, when an impatient Mr. Blik chucked Gomez out the car, Waffle went berserk and sped up to try and get him back.

Once, when an impatient Mr. Blik chucked Gomez out the car, Waffle went berserk and sped up to try and get him back.

characters.name: Gordon Quid
characters.description: About Gordon Quid A few quick deets on Gordon "Just to be near her (Human Kimberly) twists my tongue, and no words can escape my mouth."— Gordon All honor and heart, righter of wrong, do-er of good, Gordon is a sloppy bachelor who harbors a less-than-secret crush on the girl next door,Human Kimberly. He is loyal to a fault, full of pride, and a very messy eater.Doug TenNapelcites Gordon as the heart of the show, given his exclamatory need for righteousness, his sensible understanding, and his selfless nature, especially when it comes to the Human Kimberly or his brothers. Despite his roughian nature as a Scottish warrior that slays beastie after beastie, he's still gonna make time for love. Gordon also has another mission set before him: GetMr. Blikto do the right thing. Mr. Blik is a near 180 to Gordon, to say the least, but Gordon remains patient throughout the rants and raves of his shorter brother (shorter both in height and temper.) He speaks with a Scottish accent and acts like he is from Scotland, despite the fact that he's really not. Factually, Gordon was born underneath the couch in their mansion, but Gordon still had vivid memories of being in Scotland, letting nothing convince him otherwise. Any battle he fights, he fights in the name of what he believes to be his homeland, the Highland Quid Clan, even if the clan itself didn't recall ever having known him before. He was never an official member until he proved he was worthy when he banishedThe Bansheefrom the Highland Quid Clan village, and he even got to befriend aSeal Woman. Gordon is a very passionate cat, that stops at nothing to do right. Be it breaking his brother out of the pound, or traveling to a distantKraken Planetto bring the rightful return of theKraken’s title as prince. He loved his owner,Edna Cramdilly, dearly when she was still alive, and he felt as though he was her favorite out of the trio since birth. But Gordon's sense of righteousness can get to him occasionally, shown in a memory from long ago when Gordon was assaulted bya duckling at the park. When Gordon jumped into Cramdilly’s arms out of the duck’s reach, he noticed a look of shame at the disgraced cat. The fact he disappointed his owner left him scarred to the point that he breaks down as soon as he saw the duck again. This could be a further explanation as to why he's always up for a brawl, and always up to do right by others, even at his own risk. Often, Gordon's job around the mansion is in the culinary arts- but most of the Scottish dishes he cooks are considered inedible. There are times where he winds up eating the entire meal before he could serve it, or eating way too much. His singing hobby quite regularly irritates Mr. Blik. His booming singing voice has been shown to shatter glass and stone, and also heal stomach distress. Gordon is also well-versed in mythology, owning a pop-up book of mythological weapons, and even having grown the elusiveLucky Clawonce. Overall, Gordon, despite his savage acr

characters.name: Guardians
characters.description: Guardians are divine and powerful robots that appeared inGEAR. Guardians exist since the legendary Forbidden Mechanism was made. According to that legend, if the Forbidden Mechanism was found and put into the gears of a Guardian, the person who did it would gain the ultimate power. From that time on, Northplate cats, Dogtown dogs, Southplate insects and Newton cats were in a war, using the huge robots as defenders and war machines. As the rumors spread that the Mechanism was found and brought to Newton, Northplate and Dogtown ally up, while Southplate start an attack on Newton of their own.
